title: IT support (Intern)
description:
Job Title : IT Support (Intern)

Reporting Line: IT Manager


Key responsibilities

1. Assist with basic troubleshooting for staff (e.g., laptop issues, Wi-Fi, printing, software queries).

2. Help with setting up user accounts, installing applications, and preparing devices.

3. Support routine maintenance tasks such as updates, checks, and equipment housekeeping.

4. Provide first-level assistance and escalate issues to the RSMSF IT team when necessary.


Education and Qualifications

· Minimum Diploma preferably in IT

Knowledge and Skills

· Proficient in MS Office and Outlook

· Excellent command of both written and spoken English.

Attributes

· Meticulous with good time management and ability to multi-task under tight timelines.

· Ability to stay calm and professional under pressure.

· Ability to be flexible and adaptable.

· Team player.

. Must be able to commit for at least 6 months.

postedCompany.description:
The Association of Banks in Singapore (ABS) is a non-profit organisation that represents the interests of the commercial and investment banking community. As at 31 December 2024, our membership comprised 155 local and foreign banks/institutions and representative offices operating in Singapore

Our roles include:

1. Representing the Commercial and Investment Banking Industry: We voice the interests of our members in Singapore through strategic engagement with our stakeholders – banks, regulators and customers.

2. Upholding the Integrity of Members: We work with members to develop and implement industry code of conduct and guidelines that are in line with international best practices.

3. Building Relationships within the Industry: We build consensus among members with differing opinions and coordinate as well as gather support for projects of mutual benefit.

4. Collaborating with Regional and International Organisations: We partner with these organisations to strengthen members' interests.
postedCompany.name: The Association of Banks in Singapore
